what_it_does: Pulls data from Google Sheets, auto-generates documents in DocuSeal, files PDFs in Drive folders by contractor name, and updates the sheet with completion status and links.
pain_it_solves: Eliminates manually creating documents one-by-one, downloading PDFs, organizing files into folders, and tracking completion status across spreadsheets.
outcome: 30 contractor documents auto-generated, filed in organized folders, and tracked in seconds instead of hours of manual work.
opener_hook_draft: Creating 30 contractor documents manually, filing them, and tracking status takes hours of tedious work.
bespoke_opener_full: Creating 30 contractor documents manually, filing them, and tracking status takes hours of tedious work. This is how our Sheets to PDF/DocuSeal automation generates, files, and tracks all documents in seconds. In the next 90 seconds, I'll show you exactly how it works.
